title: Add adaptive friction-aware execution governor
goal: Translate evidence-bound Grabowski friction patterns and capability metadata into bounded, explainable execution-shape recommendations that reduce avoidable platform blocks, connector ambiguity and broad retries without weakening safety, authorization or recovery gates.

acceptance.assertion: The governor consumes only typed capability metadata, operation class, bounded payload-shape features, resource and lease state, and evidence-bound friction fingerprints; raw secret values and unrestricted command text are excluded from learned state.

For each supported operation the result explains whether to use a typed tool, grip or durable task, whether reads may be batched, where mutations must be split, which preflight is required, the retry budget and the mandatory post-state readback.

The first deployment is proposal-only shadow mode and records predicted versus actual friction, first-pass success, unchanged retries, ambiguous mutation outcomes, tool-call count and elapsed time before any automatic routing promotion.

Only low- and medium-risk routing parameters may be promoted after an explicit minimum evidence threshold and measured improvement; promotions are append-only, time-decayed, reversible and automatically disabled by a regression circuit breaker.

Learning cannot weaken or rewrite user intent, authorization, secret handling, recovery, kill-switch, review, merge, deployment or privileged-execution gates; high and critical actions remain explicit preflight, one mutation and receipt-bound readback.

A connector or response failure after a possible mutation yields unknown outcome and blocks an unchanged retry until target state is re-read; a later success does not erase the original transport event.

Focused deterministic tests cover broad read decomposition, mutation isolation, platform-filter no-retry, post-mutation 502 ambiguity, risk-boundary enforcement, evidence decay, promotion, rollback and circuit-breaker behavior.

metadata.source: Live Grabowski configuration and friction audit on 2026-07-11

evidence_summary.observed_gap: Friction classification, closeout and next-grip proposals exist, but proposal evidence does not yet govern execution shape or measure whether routing changes reduce friction.

does_not_establish: permission to bypass a blocked call
